runtime_destination: deferred — unregistered interim; later activation slice

style_references.note: gate-passing absolute-zero-r1 used as pitch reference during wildfire-sigil-r4

issue_exact_prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art Talent icon ONLY. Drawn on an exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large; every logical pixel is one clean flat square block with no smaller detail, smooth gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, or dithering. A single centered symbolic Management Dock skill glyph for Wildfire Sigil: a circular flame rune with three outward embers, reading area Fire Damage plus Scorched without becoming a spell-effect frame. Not a wearable Equipment item, not a scene, not a full Character, and not a UI frame. The subject long side spans about 26–30 logical pixels, with at least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Selective one-logical-pixel dark-plum outline. Use only mint, berry, cream, and plum Moonberry colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum; no brown, tan, cyan, pure white, or pure black. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No shadow, glow, sparkle, particles, text, watermark, or transparency.
prompt: TRUE chunky pixel art Talent icon ONLY. A single centered symbolic Management Dock skill glyph for Wildfire Sigil: a circular flame rune with three outward embers, reading area Fire Damage plus Scorched without becoming a spell-effect frame. Not a wearable Equipment item, not a scene, not a full Character, and not a UI frame. Subject fills the frame with MANY small logical pixels (about 26–30 cells across), not a few large soft shapes. At least two full magenta cells of clearance on every edge. Flat solid magenta #ff00ff background, nothing else in frame. Selective one-logical-pixel dark-plum outline. Use only mint, berry, cream, and plum Moonberry colors, 8–12 flat colors maximum; no brown, tan, cyan, pure white, or pure black. Structural members are at least three logical pixels thick. No shadow, glow, sparkle, particles, text, watermark, or transparency.
